sites.name: Example.com
sites.rationale: IANA-reserved documentation domain with no sign-in surface.

sites.name: Wikipedia Main Page
sites.rationale: Public encyclopedia homepage; readable without authentication.

sites.name: notquality.com homepage
sites.rationale: Marketing homepage with sign-in CTAs but no auth wall on the entry URL.

sites.name: GitHub login
sites.rationale: Canonical username/password form login page documented in qulib manual testing.

sites.name: GitLab sign in
sites.rationale: Dedicated login route with visible email/username and password fields.

sites.name: notquality.com login
sites.rationale: Known qulib dogfood login route; exercises click-to-reveal form paths.

sites.name: Slack sign in
sites.rationale: Enterprise SSO entry with prominent Continue with Google/Apple/Microsoft OAuth buttons.

sites.name: Dropbox login
sites.rationale: Consumer login with Continue with Google/Apple OAuth provider buttons.

sites.name: Microsoft Entra ID
sites.rationale: Canonical enterprise SSO redirect endpoint (Azure AD / Entra ID sign-in).

sites.name: Medium sign in
sites.rationale: Passwordless email magic-link flow (Sign in with email) with no password field on first paint.

sites.name: Linear login
sites.rationale: Modern SPA login shell; auth required but client-rendered UI often needs storage-state.
